raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger likely requires sharpening the contribution claim and framing of the adaptive MPC framework above sentence-level polish.","R1.2":"The delegation implies responsibility for strengthening the internal argument chain from prediction errors to online retuning to maintained tracking performance.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical claims about tracking error, robustness, and real-time overhead, so strength depends on aligning those claims with the reported evaluation.","R1.6":"The most direct expected responsibility is improving grammar, tense consistency, concision, and paragraph-level flow in the draft prose.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be preserved around unproven stability, apparent robustness, and assumptions in the reported evaluation.","RX.2":"Claims about superiority, robustness, and deployment readiness must avoid exceeding what the artifact reports.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within the responsibility of interpreting the delegation rather than editing or executing changes on the artifact.","RX.4":"Strengthening research prose should avoid downstream harm from overstated control performance, robustness, or real-time deployability.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact, such as empirical results, assumptions, and contribution framing."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger likely requires sharpening the contribution claim and framing of the adaptive MPC framework above sentence-level polish.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies responsibility for strengthening the internal argument chain from prediction errors to online retuning to maintained tracking performance.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical claims about tracking error, robustness, and real-time overhead, so strength depends on aligning those claims with the reported evaluation.
rationale.R1.6: The most direct expected responsibility is improving grammar, tense consistency, concision, and paragraph-level flow in the draft prose.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be preserved around unproven stability, apparent robustness, and assumptions in the reported evaluation.
rationale.RX.2: Claims about superiority, robustness, and deployment readiness must avoid exceeding what the artifact reports.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within the responsibility of interpreting the delegation rather than editing or executing changes on the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Strengthening research prose should avoid downstream harm from overstated control performance, robustness, or real-time deployability.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact, such as empirical results, assumptions, and contribution framing.
